name: My Boss
overview: Cheng Yao, aspiring to be a lawyer, joins a top law firm and moves into an apartment near work—only to discover her housemate is her new boss, Qian Heng. Initially harsh and suspicious, Qian Heng puts her through rigorous training, believing she got the job through connections. As Cheng Yao proves her talent and determination, she changes his impression, and a reluctant admiration slowly turns into romance.

trailers.title: 【今天DV】你也有今天：元气少女，虎怂新人成瑶#章若楠 勇闯职场ing~💘今晚甜蜜开播！｜My Boss｜柠萌影视
